conflict: Private choices become public performance under global scrutiny; the virus threat is live
consequence: Winning and selfhood revealed as different currencies; the characters' choices become visible to the world
must_land_beats: Lena's 400m freestyle on the patch: slower than her optimization peak, entirely her own, third place
Kai races the 200m unpatched and virus-vulnerable; virus triggers at 160m; he overrides the autonomous firing and finishes last under his own power
The crowd does not understand what they saw; Kai does

payoffs_to_land.description: Kai has learned to feel and override his system's autonomous movements—the drift that was a symptom in Ch 1 becomes a skill in Ch 17
Weeks of practicing manual override pay off: Kai stops his body from running without him and finishes under his own power

pressure_source: Private choices become public performance under global scrutiny; the virus threat is live
state_shift: Winning and selfhood revealed as different currencies; the characters' choices become visible to the world
